<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Event\Code; /** * @immutable * * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final readonly class ComparisonFailure { private string $expected; private string $actual; private string $diff; public function __construct(string $expected, string $actual, string $diff) { $this->expected = $expected; $this->actual = $actual; $this->diff = $diff; } public function expected(): string { return $this->expected; } public function actual(): string { return $this->actual; } public function diff(): string { return $this->diff; } }
